message:
fix(storage): Handle 'all' agent_slug in count_sessions_direct

Added consistency check for agent_slug parameter to match source_id
handling. When agent_slug is Some("all"), we now skip the filter
(like we do for source_id) instead of filtering for a.slug='all'
which would return no results.

This ensures count_sessions_direct behaves consistently with
count_sessions_in_range when 'all' is passed explicitly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
